title: L'articolo 21 nella gabbia di Facebook - Terzogiornale
snippet: The article references a recent study by Fabio Giglietto, Full Professor of Cultural and Communicative Processes Sociology at the University of Urbino, which investigates the effects of Meta's policy to reduce political content on Facebook from 2021 to 2025.
description: This article from Terzogiornale references a recent study by Fabio Giglietto, Full Professor at the University of Urbino, investigating Meta's policy on reducing political content on Facebook from 2021 to 2025.

title: How Facebook's Algorithmic Tweaks Affected Engagement with News URLs over Time
snippet: Axel Bruns' blog post live-blogging the 2026 International Communication Association (ICA) conference in Cape Town, where Fabio Giglietto presented a paper titled "How Facebook's Algorithmic Tweaks Affected Engagement with News URLs over Time". The paper focuses on partisan alignment, journalistic quality, and algorithmic amplification on Facebook.
description: A blog post by Axel Bruns from the 2026 ICA conference live-blogging Fabio Giglietto's presentation on how Facebook's algorithmic changes influence news engagement, partisan alignment, and journalistic quality.
